name: Gallica
description:
Height: 9 inches tall (12 inches tall if including her wings)

Species: Fairy

Age: Unknown (nearly immortal...but at least 18. Hundred.)

Abilities: Flying and sensing intense sources of Magla

Clothing: A knight visor, light-blue armored gloves, white belt, knee-high boots, a yellow with blue patterns leotard, a sheathed sword

Hair: Short cut, shoulder length, auburn color

Eyes: Blue

Characteristics: Short stature and human in shape with fairy wings which are long and slender and translucent. She has slightly elongated, pointy elf-like ears that protrude away from her head.
creator: Capricus
